summary: Staff Health Questionnaire feature fully tested and working. All 11 features verified: form appears in What's Needed tab, opens with Osabea branding (green header), has 3 sections (Personal Info with 9 fields, Health Questions with 9 Yes/No dropdowns, Declaration with 3 fields), conditional detail textareas appear when 'Yes' selected, form submits to form_submissions collection, status changes to 'Ready for Review' after submission, View Form modal displays all submitted data, Edit button opens form with pre-filled data, Mark as Approved works via API.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/form-submissions/template/staff_health_questionnaire returns 200
✅ Backend: Template has correct structure (requirement_id, name, form_type)
✅ Backend: Template has Osabea branding (show_logo=true, header_color=#2E7D32, company_name)
✅ Backend: Template has 3 sections (personal_info, health_questions, declaration)
✅ Backend: Personal Information section has 9 fields
✅ Backend: Health Questions section has 8 Yes/No dropdowns with conditional detail fields
✅ Backend: Declaration section has 3 fields (checkbox, signature, date)
✅ Backend: Existing form submission found for test employee
✅ Backend: Submission has correct data structure with all required fields
✅ Backend: Submission appears in compliance requirements with 'completed' status
✅ Backend: Form submission can be verified via POST /api/form-submissions/{id}/verify
✅ Backend: Verified submission shows correct status in compliance requirements
✅ Backend: Auto-fill endpoint returns employee data
✅ Backend: staff_health_questionnaire recognized as form-based requirement
✅ Backend: Compliance requirements includes form submission data for viewing
✅ Frontend: Staff Health Questionnaire appears in What's Needed tab
✅ Frontend: Form opens with Osabea branding (green header #2E7D32)
✅ Frontend: Company name 'Osabea Healthcare Solutions Ltd' displayed
✅ Frontend: Personal Information section visible with 9 fields
✅ Frontend: Health Questions section visible with Yes/No dropdowns
✅ Frontend: Declaration section visible
✅ Frontend: Pre-filled data (Olakunle Alonge) shown in form
✅ Frontend: Conditional textarea appears when 'Yes' selected for health question
✅ Frontend: View Form modal opens and displays submitted data
✅ Frontend: Edit button opens form with pre-filled data
✅ Frontend: View, View Form, Edit, Download, Mark as Approved buttons present
critical_code_review_comments: Backend FORM_BASED_REQUIREMENTS['staff_health_questionnaire'] correctly defined at line ~2778 with branding, 3 sections, and conditional fields
Frontend FORM_BASED_REQUIREMENTS array includes 'staff_health_questionnaire' at line 40
Frontend form modal correctly renders green Osabea branding header when formTemplate.branding.show_logo is true (line ~6101)
Conditional field display works correctly - textarea appears when Yes is selected
Form submission correctly stores all 21 data fields in form_submissions collection
Auto-fill works for full_name, date_of_birth, and phone fields

health_questions: Hospital admissions last 5 years (Yes/No + conditional details)
Medical problems affecting work (Yes/No + conditional details)
